rpolars 0.2.0
  • Reference

Reference

rpolars classes

Are a classsystem that extends the extendr class system (let’s call it “environment classes”). Below is the individual derived classes documented.

DataFrame

DataFrame()

Create new DataFrame

LazyFrame_collect()

New DataFrame from LazyFrame_object$collect()

as_data_frame() to_data_frame() as.data.frame(<DataFrame>)

return polars DataFrame as R data.frame

DataFrame_class

Inner workings of the DataFrame-class

DataFrame_clone()

Clone a DataFrame

DataFrame_columns

get/set columns (the names columns)

DataFrame_dtypes() DataFrame_schema()

DataFrame dtypes

DataFrame_get_column() DataFrame_to_series()

Get Column (as one Series)

DataFrame_get_columns

Get columns (as Series)

DataFrame_groupby()

groupby DataFrame

DataFrame_height()

Height of DataFrame

DataFrame_join()

join DataFrame with other DataFrame

DataFrame_lazy

New LazyFrame from DataFrame_object$lazy()

DataFrame_limit()

Limit a DataFrame

DataFrame_select()

perform select on DataFrame

DataFrame_shape()

Shape of DataFrame

`self$to_struct(name)` DataFrame_unnest()

to_struct and unnest again

DataFrame_width()

Width of DataFrame

DataFrame_with_columns() DataFrame_with_column()

modify/append column(s)

`$<-`(<DataFrame>)

generic setter method

.DollarNames(<DataFrame>)

auto complete $-access into object

DataFrame_filter()

filter DataFrame

pl_select

Select from an empty DataFrame

DataFrame_to_list()

return polars DataFrame as R lit of vectors

LazyFrame

DataFrame_lazy

New LazyFrame from DataFrame_object$lazy()

Expr

all

New Expr referring to all columns

col

Start Expression with a column

max

max across expressions / literals / Series

min

min across expressions / literals / Series

sum

sum across expressions / literals / Series

Expr_print()

internal method print Expr

Expr_lit() Expr_suffix() Expr_prefix() Expr_reverse()

Polars Expr

Expr_abs

Abs

Expr_add `+`(<Expr>)

Add

Expr_agg_groups

aggregate groups

Expr_alias

Rename Expr output

Expr_all

All (is true)

Expr_and

And

Expr_any

Any (is true)

Append expressions

Expr_exclude()

Exclude certain columns from a wildcard/regex selection.

Expr_exp

Compute the exponential, element-wise.

Expr_explode Expr_flatten

Explode a list or utf8 Series.

Expr_fill_null()

hash

Head

Expr_inspect()

is in between

Expr_is_duplicated

Expr_is_finite

Are elements finite

Expr_is_first

Get a mask of the first unique value.

is_in

Are elements infinite

Expr_is_nan

Are elements NaN's

Expr_is_not_nan

Are elements not NaN's

is_not_null

is_null

Expr_is_unique

Get mask of unique values

Expr_list

.DollarNames(<Series>)

auto complete $-access into object

rpolars API and namespace

rpolars api’s is not exported in NAMESPACE, because it would collide badly with base R and other popular functions. As rpolars strive to mimic the syntax and behavior of py-polars, vast majority of methods are internal accessed with $-operator. pl is the public api of functions and class constructors. All functions, objects and methods needed to interact with polars are accessed via pl$ or object$method(). .pr the private class methods, which always are calls to rust-polars. Also rpolars::: have lots of private R functions.

pl

The complete rpolars public API.

object

Any rpolars class object is made of this

.pr

polars-API: private calls to rust-polars

Internals

Internal documented functions

construct_ProtoExprArray()

construct proto Expr array from args

.DollarNames(<Expr>)

auto complete $-access into object

prepare_alpha()

preapare alpha

wrap_e()

wrap as literal

everything else

internal method print DataFrame

add syntax verification to class

Get Memory Address

method_as_property()

Give a class method property behavior

Move environment element from one env to another

pcase()

Simple SQL CASE WHEN implementation for R

print(<DataFrame>)

s3 method print DataFrame

print(<DataType>)

print a polars datatype

print(<GroupBy>)

print GroupBy

print(<LazyFrame>)

print LazyFrame s3 method

print(<LazyGroupBy>)

print LazyGroupBy

print_env()

print recursively an environment, used in some documentation

pstop()

Internal preferred function to throw errors

read_csv_()

high level csv_reader, will download if path is url

replace_private_with_pub_methods()

remove private method

restruct_list()

restruct an object where structs where previously unnested

strictly_immutable named_exprs no_messages get_rpolars_options rpolars_options set_rpolars_options reset_rpolars_options

rpolars options

runtime_state

internal keeping of state at runtime

unAsIs()

Reverts wrapping in I

unwrap()

rust-like unwrapping of result. Useful to keep error handling on the R side.

verify_method_call()

Verify user selected method/attribute exists

wrap_s()

Wrap as Series
